DashboardSubtitle: Configure live providers, controller styling, polling rate, and the active controller.
ProfileToolbarSubtitle: Switch profiles, create or duplicate setups, and import or export JSON definitions.
DeleteProfileBlockedLastOne: Cannot delete the last remaining profile — at least one profile must always exist.
MappingOverviewSubtitle: Click any control to open its dedicated editor.
NoMappingCardsText: No mappings yet — add a rule from the editor on the right.
AutomaticControllerSelectionDescription: Use whichever controller the provider reports first.
ProviderStatus_DemoActive: Demo preview active — animated source, no hardware
ProviderStatus_XInputNoDevices: XInput active — no compatible controllers detected
ProviderStatus_XInputUnavailable: XInput is only available on Windows
ProviderStatus_SdlActive: SDL3 unified input active — {0} gamepad(s) detected
ProviderStatus_UInputUnavailable: Linux uinput is only available on Linux
ProviderStatus_CoreHidUnavailable: macOS CoreHID is only available on macOS
ProviderStatus_NoLiveInput: Live input is disabled for this profile
AboutBodyLine1: Autofire Next is a controller mapping engine.
AboutBodyLine2: Define rules in the profile editor, then run the dashboard against your hardware.
AboutBodyLine3: All rules are stored as JSON next to the profile file.
